title: Orcot Hypotheticals multiple threads merger
wikitext:
[]: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by orcot » Wed Jul 01, 2020 2:41 pm How would you rewrite the episode Jet alone to make it more enjoyable ? You're allowed to change the order of episode for example you can begin the episode afther Asuka is introduced but say no later then episode before leliel

[]: Re: rewriting Jet alone             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 01, 2020 3:17 pm Perhaps you could start the conversation by sharing your own thoughts on the matter.

[]: Re: rewriting Jet alone             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jul 01, 2020 9:02 pm A Human Work is just fine as it is. I really don't get the hate; it makes sense structurally and narratively, establishes both that Nerv is not very well liked to the point of sinking billions into making functional competition and that they are not above sabotaging their on paper allies to further their own goals, gives a breather episode in between an emotional climax and a serious breakup of the status quo and explores the relationship and past of most of the adults. This episode can stay as is; if I absolutely had to change something, I'd double down on this plot line and have some of it come back later in the show in the form of weapon technology or some other background element to acknowledge the arc

[]: Re: rewriting Jet alone             Quote Post by orcot » Thu Jul 02, 2020 2:29 pm Well it had been a long time since I've seen the episodes but I plan on watching them again pretty soon (I also read the manga). I would make it a 2 parter together with the introduction of Asuka Essentially the company that made jet alone is also a member of Seele but not of NERV and want's to take control of eva 02 (not letting Gendo control all the eva's) They also made the weapon that killed Ramiel. At the start of the first episode we meet 2 eva unit's, unit 2 and unit 4 (rebranded as eva 3 but it is the silver one). They recieving the S²core (of Shamshel who will cause the destruction of now unit 3 as they try to incorperate it into the eva).This alone will make sure Gendo will get his way but that's only revealed later. Shinji is send to the carrier that has Unit 02 and the spear of longinus, however Asuka is not present but a back up pilot, staying close to the Original Kaworu is the most Obvious candidate getting a short cameo and he can give some exposition abouth the soul of Asuka's mother. Alternatives are either a child agent of the other company to socialize with Asuka or a American pilot of unit 03 (04 the one who will blow up off screen in the orginal). Eitherway they will get attacked by gagiel. Seeing Shinji in Asuka's plugsuit aided by the alt pilot (kaworu) would probably be more funny then the original. The idea being that without Asuka unit 2 can not brake the AT field so they use the spear of Longinus. It works but it get's lost to the sea, (they will try and retrieve it in in the volcano episode that will be a deep sea episode). Meanwhile Asuka is in Tokyo at the meeting of "human made" Gendo get's a moment of awesome, as during the entire series Gendo is never really portrayed positively and this early on he also deserves a moment in the sun. Perhaps have a eulogy not at yui's grave but a general grave of the unknown victims, with both Rei and Asuka present but not Shinji. See Gendo trying to seduce Ritsuko Have a awkward moment between Rei and Asuka. Episode 02 Most of the human made episode,Eva 02 is in the water but luckily has a inflatable ring similar as used in episode 9. So unit 02 eventually will be towed into the harbor. Pissing of Asuka as she did not get to pilot her eva in it's first real fight at is get's towd to shore humorously. (Kaworu dissapears before meeting the rest of the cast only to return afther Asuka dissapears). Shinji will meet Asuka at the worst possible time Yet alone goes beserk but they agree to Gendo's wishes and yet alone is allowed to continue to exist, their will be multiple excuses why it's relativly useless in combat but it will be the designated sniper. Misato and the pilots will have diner at some point.

[]: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by orcot » Fri Aug 07, 2020 9:31 am Rei probably could have survived armisael attack if they had send unit 00 out with the dummy plug and a N2 mine. But that would have undone the entire situation. Do you believe Rei(II) could have survived afther she got invaded? A possible interaction could have been that when armisael sought contact with Rei(II) the inner soul of Unit 00 also popped up. This could have happend in multiple ways Rei (II) could have answered in double speak (echo like talk) pushing the Rei has schizophrenia theory. A other way to visualize it would be to give Rei a peterpan like shadow that dances around inside the Eva around Rei(II) and Armisael. And slowly attaches itself to Rei(II) becoming more and more coherent. The conversation still ends with Armisael attacking Shinji and Rei (II) pulling armisael in and detonating a N2 mine (to save Shinji). The mine still explodes killing both Armisael, unit 00 and story wise Rei II. But the N2 mine was not in Rei(II) entry plug. As the recovery team find Rei's entry plug both in the Anime and the Manga and it is not vaporized and Rei(II) hand is still hand shaped. So the mine was most likely inside the body of unit 00. In this alternate reality Rei(II) has the same intentions and same reason like the Original. But unit 00 goes "Beserk" places the N2 mine on a short timer and has a very brief conversation with Rei(II) and eject her entry plug out like happend during the first (failed) activation test. (the one that turned her into a mummy)(the image could be partialy based on how Misato was saved by her dad, with Rei showing a similar wound across the belly). (Meanwhile Rei I maintains the AT field with Armisael beeing confused as S*** and perhaps Rei taunts Armisael by taking the form of Naoko as Armisael looks like Rei and Naoko killed Rei I it also makes it somewhat ambigous who's soul exactly in there as a other alternative she takes the form of adam as this is probably the form Armisael would have wanted to see before he died [adam beein Armisael parent]). Something of Rei(I) being a wall of light saying something in the likes of "come by my side" with a confused Armisael saying "…father?" followed by the N2 explosion would look the best and would be in line on how Rei handles third impact. I don't really mind that Rei II (still) dies. But both the manga and the series make it somewhat ambigious if Rei is still alive or not and that it needs to be verified. Whilst it is Obvious that she is dead had she been in a rocket shooting away from the blast radius with a lead of several seconds people could genuily wonder is she escaped or not. Rei could still have had her death wish, whilst at the same time shown desire to outlive her situation, this could have given the same emotional response like the Original. Meanwhile Rei I trying to save Rei II would have shown some final character growth. In the end story wise it is probably best to kill of Rei II at this point.

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by Berserker » Sat Aug 08, 2020 8:56 am Anno really wants Rei to suffer and live(die) with misery.

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Aug 08, 2020 10:09 am Berserker wrote: Anno really wants Rei to suffer and live(die) with misery.

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by Derantor » Sat Aug 08, 2020 10:22 am But both the manga and the series make it somewhat ambigious if Rei is still alive or not

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Aug 08, 2020 11:43 am Derantor wrote: Look closely - there's Kentucky fried Rei in the entry plug after she self-destructs. Tech 1: Well, o'course she was nailed there! If I hadn't nailed her down, she would have nuzzled up to the hatch, bent it apart with her hands, and VOOM! Feeweeweewee! Tech 2: "VOOM"?!? Mate, she wouldn't "voom" if you put four million volts through her! She's bleedin' demised! Tech 1: No no! She's pining! Tech 2: Pinin?? She's not pinin'! She's passed on! This Rei is no more! She has ceased to be! She's expired and gone to meet her maker! She's a stiff! Bereft of life, she rests in peace! If she wasn't burnt to a crisp, she'd be pushing up the daisies! Her metabolic processes are now history! She's off the Eva! She's kicked the bucket, she's shuffled off her mortal coil, run down the curtain and joined the bleedin' choir invisible!! THIS IS AN EX-REI!! Tech 1: ... Well, I'd better replace her, then. (Heh, X-ray ).

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Aug 08, 2020 3:44 pm orcot wrote: Rei II is seen still alive afther the explosion but still pretty fucked up giving some last character develoment where she states she hopes she will survive this and that she hopes to see all of them again. Perhaps ending with some poem. She will offcourse be dead before a rescue team could salvage her. but that would be a in a other episode or comic. Unit 01 being disabled by the blast, Shinji wakes up in the hospital not sure if Rei is alive or not. Beginning the next story Rei III is kept somehwat ambigious and a first viewing people could be forgiven to think Rei II survived with amnesia but it's clear by the end when ritsuko destroys the dummy system that their had been 3 Rei's missing.

[]: Re: Could Rei have survived armisael in a meaninful way             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Aug 09, 2020 12:41 am Blockio wrote: That's just cheap writing. If you get charred alive, you don't live just long enough to reflect on the world one final time. You are dead. Full stop. Keep that "final moment of joy when you really should be dead already" garbage in shows where nobody ever stays dead for longer than two seasons to begin with.

[]: If I'm ordered to I'll do it             Quote Post by orcot » Fri Aug 21, 2020 12:58 pm Say a remade of the NGE series was ordered and the writers would like to add in a gag on Rei's famous "If I'm ordered to I'll do it" in response to Asuka "Let's be friends" line. What would be your pitch idea. In short Rei is ordered to hang out with Asuka for a certain amount of time for a certain reason what do they do (and who will break first, do they actualy have fun for some time)? Here is a pitch The spear of longinues not being in antartica but already recovered by the american. The director of the Jet alone is a affable evil/designated villain member of Seele who does not want Gendo to have to much power and offers a alternative robot (Jet alone). Whilst making it obvious it does not have a AT field he secretly plans to use the spear as a weapon. Gendo finds this out and wants the spear to keep lilith in check and has traded Shamsiel core (S2 organ) in return for the spear to the americans. Asuka in unit 02 and unit 04 pick up the core in america. Asuka seemingly goes onboard of the carrier with the spear whilst unit 04 leaves with the core. Gendo is officialy informed and invited to the introduction of jet alone and says he will be present. Afther the fight with Ramiel Gendo has dinner with Rei, when Rei suggest a dinner party for him and Shinji and gendo agrees (later it's implied it was conveniet because he might need a alibi). Then he sends Shinji/Misato out to meet Asuka on the carrier and bring her to tokyo. (both Shinji and Rei get a +1 guest invite it is ment that Shinji uses his +1 for Asuka) However Asuka arrives early on a plane (Shinji will meet unit's 2 backup pilot kaworu who will be naked coming out of a shower). Asuka knows of the trade so Gendo needs to keep her away from the jet alone party until afther Jet alone has gone beserk. So he orders her to go out with Asuka. Whilst Asuka is reading a magazine still in the airport Rei steps into her light introduces herself and asks what she likes to do. Rei suggest the cinema as it fills the time and she doesn't have to talk,but they end up going to a arcade hall. Asuka pressures Rei into picking something and ask her if she is in the mood of yust dumb robots fighting each other or something with a bit of story. They play a game and Asuka is bit to competitive and loud. Asuka ambigiously either calls Rei a smurf or their playing the smurfs. Asuka leaves for a moment and Rei who had spotted Toji and Kensuke (Kensuke wanted to see the giant robot). Investigates Hikari is also present Rei promises the +1 to kensuke if he can keep Asuka occupied (he get's a window seat and snacks whilst he can look at the cool robot). Rei bails and the introduction of Asuka happens according to the comics without Shinji present. Then the tv show the attack of gaghiel. Shinji fought gahiel in Asuka's plugsuit together with kaworu using the longinues spear who is now on the bottom of the ocean, unit 02 is floating in the ocean with a flotation device similar to the one seen in episode 9. Asuka ends up royaly pissed. Both on Rei, Shinji and the director of jet alone who convinced her of flying over abandoning unit 2

[]: Unsatisfied with Rei's apartment             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Aug 23, 2020 3:11 am Rei's apartment is a weird place for sure, it curtainly gives off the right vibe but it always bothers me how Rei ever ended up at this place or why theirs water and electricity. It also looks like a unsafe neigberhoud to house what is a essential employee in a compagnee that tries to safe the world. What if instead of the decrepit apartment. Rei's apartement is in a old boarding school, where the school part has burned down. The burnend down school could be gothic in nature and left as protected heritage. Where Shinji will ultimatly find Kaworu afther wandering there afther the events of armisael. The boys dorm could be converted into something explaining the heavy noice and machinery. And the library is made open to the public. Theirs also a massive underground shelter incase of a angel attack having one under the school seems commen, Shinji's current school seems to have one as well. It is also insinuated that theirs a hidden pathway into NERV headquaters in the school. Last of all it might as well be a front for the marduk institute as well they have like a 100 locations and as their job are to select children for the e-project having a office in a boarding school in tokyo 3 where NERV is located wouldn't be that weird of a location. So yeah from 1 side it looks, like a decend human city center with a active libary and being under constant renovation from the other side it looks like a burnend down religious ruin inside it looks clean until you move afther the facade then it is unmaintainend and underground a whole lot of mistery and speculation. (the interior apartment is probably okay altough it would be fun to have a obvious door that is never openend making you wonder what is behind it [like is it a secret elevator that allows Rei to reach central dogma unnoticed to innitiate third impact or is it yust a closet space or a little office]). Furthermore It would also hold a former office for fuyutsuki (given guest lectures and having a office where educational relations mail could arrive). The fire should have happenend around 2 years before (that's when Rei transfered to the new school). Sending Rei to a boarding school would be in line with Gendo's tought patron (he send Shinji to live with his teacher as well). Because sending a <10 year old to live in Rei's original apartment would be a criminal offence. that's what I would do with Rei's apartment.

[]: Re: If I'm ordered to I'll do it             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 23, 2020 8:18 pm Many of your threads are incredibly specific (to the point of making participation from others difficult to impossible) and fall under the general umbrella of "here's how I would change Evangelion". I've found some three to four of these threads, though there might be more. We do have a "what would you change about Evangelion" thread but your topics show a level of preoccupation with the subject that suggests what you really ought to be doing is writing Eva fanfics. In which case, you are definitely in the wrong subforum. But I'm not suggesting that you just start creating these threads in Fanfiction instead -- I would like to see fewer of these threads, as for your own purposes you only need a single thread at most for cataloguing your ideas. I honestly think you should try to organize your thoughts and come up with something you'd be willing to commit yourself to writing and completing. Help target that energy a little. But ultimately it's up to you -- I'm just a janitor.

[]: Re: If I'm ordered to I'll do it             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Sun Aug 23, 2020 8:20 pm if you would organize all your thoughts in one thing, and maybe encourage others to do so too, that would be an EPIC thread. i'd be checking it often

[]: Re: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by orcot » Wed Aug 26, 2020 12:50 pm aparantly random toughts now but afther reading the "Trans* Allegories Within Evangelion" I wondered how a genderbend Asuka and Rei would act differently. I remembered that in the earlist concept design Shinji was actualy a girl. This makes me wonder could Toji and Kensuke be considered early concept for Asuka and Rei? Toji like Asuka is a alpha type that has a foreign accent he is prone to violance but becomes a great friend he is also quick to comment and likes to take the lead, kensuke on the other hand is very pale and acts like he is somewhere on the autisme spectrum he has very specific intrest (military) and if not mysterious he is good on figuring out information. It is weird those 2 aren't particulairy close in the anime. Kensuke should have adored Rei the moment he found out she was a eva pilot from before Shinji joined. Rei probably would have enjoyed going camping discovering the country around Tokyo 3 and sleeping in spartan conditions with yust a tent and a sleeping bag. Kensuke also at least has some social skills witch would have worked better if eva was more abouth the robots and less abouth psychological trauma. So the genderbender angla would be a bad story Asuka and Rei would yust jump to Toji and Kensuka also because gendo named both Shinji and Rei and femlale Shinji would have been named Rei Ikari and a male Rei would have been named Shinji Ayanami, this would yust be confusing. Still if the early concept design was right I would have liked to see have seen a nod with Toji doing Asuka happy stand (spread legs hands on waist)[examples when they go have dinner "the value of miracles 21:15" of when the power is out and Shinji is opening the door "the day tokyo stood stil 9:18"] and Kensuke doing Rei's happy stand (clasping one arm behind her back and lifting one heel of the floor) [examples from the same scenes to make it easier to see what I mean]

[]: Re: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Wed Aug 26, 2020 12:54 pm orcot, please make a fanfiction. please. you have too many weird or cool ideas for them not to applied to SOMETHING. Anything. Derantor wrote: Look closely - there's Kentucky fried Rei in the entry plug after she self-destructs.

[]: Re: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by orcot » Wed Aug 26, 2020 2:20 pm glitz2hard wrote: They treat Rei effectively as a dummy plug. It's the same situation either way, from Gendo's point of view. FUCK GENDO

[]: Re: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by Derantor » Fri Aug 28, 2020 6:32 am glitz2hard wrote: i can't see it but i can't decide if i want to

[]: Re: Orcot Hypotheticals [multiple threads merger]             Quote Post by glitz2hard » Fri Aug 28, 2020 7:11 am Derantor wrote: Look in the lower left foreground. Half-opened right hand, thumb pointing towards the upper left corner, with three more fingers visible.

[]: Unsatisfied with Rei's apartment             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Aug 23, 2020 3:11 am Rei's apartment is a weird place for sure, it curtainly gives off the right vibe but it always bothers me how Rei ever ended up at this place or why theirs water and electricity. It also looks like a unsafe neigberhoud to house what is a essential employee in a compagnee that tries to safe the world. What if instead of the decrepit apartment. Rei's apartement is in a old boarding school, where the school part has burned down. The burnend down school could be gothic in nature and left as protected heritage. Where Shinji will ultimatly find Kaworu afther wandering there afther the events of armisael. The boys dorm could be converted into something explaining the heavy noice and machinery. And the library is made open to the public. Theirs also a massive underground shelter incase of a angel attack having one under the school seems commen, Shinji's current school seems to have one as well. It is also insinuated that theirs a hidden pathway into NERV headquaters in the school. Last of all it might as well be a front for the marduk institute as well they have like a 100 locations and as their job are to select children for the e-project having a office in a boarding school in tokyo 3 where NERV is located wouldn't be that weird of a location. So yeah from 1 side it looks, like a decend human city center with a active libary and being under constant renovation from the other side it looks like a burnend down religious ruin inside it looks clean until you move afther the facade then it is unmaintainend and underground a whole lot of mistery and speculation. (the interior apartment is probably okay altough it would be fun to have a obvious door that is never openend making you wonder what is behind it [like is it a secret elevator that allows Rei to reach central dogma unnoticed to innitiate third impact or is it yust a closet space or a little office]). Furthermore It would also hold a former office for fuyutsuki (given guest lectures and having a office where educational relations mail could arrive). The

[]: Re: If I'm ordered to I'll do it             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Aug 23, 2020 8:18 pm Many of your threads are incredibly specific (to the point of making participation from others difficult to impossible) and fall under the general umbrella of "here's how I would change Evangelion". I've found some three to four of these threads, though there might be more. We do have a "what would you change about Evangelion" thread but your topics show a level of preoccupation with the subject that suggests what you really ought to be doing is writing Eva fanfics. In which case, you are definitely in the wrong subforum. But I'm not suggesting that you just start creating these threads in Fanfiction instead -- I would like to see fewer of these threads, as for your own purposes you only need a single thread at most for cataloguing your ideas. I honestly think you should try to organize your thoughts and come up with something you'd be willing to commit yourself to writing and completing. Help target that energy a little. But ultimately it's up to you -- I'm just a janitor.

           Quote Post by orcot » Wed Aug 26, 2020 12:50 pm aparantly random toughts now but afther reading the "Trans* Allegories Within Evangelion" I wondered how a genderbend Asuka and Rei would act differently. I remembered that in the earlist concept design Shinji was actualy a girl. This makes me wonder could Toji and Kensuke be considered early concept for Asuka and Rei? Toji like Asuka is a alpha type that has a foreign accent he is prone to violance but becomes a great friend he is also quick to comment and likes to take the lead, kensuke on the other hand is very pale and acts like he is somewhere on the autisme spectrum he has very specific intrest (military) and if not mysterious he is good on figuring out information. It is weird those 2 aren't particulairy close in the anime. Kensuke should have adored Rei the moment he found out she was a eva pilot from before Shinji joined. Rei probably would have enjoyed going camping discovering the country around Tokyo 3 and sleeping in spartan conditions with yust a tent and a sleeping bag. Kensuke also at least has some social skills witch would have worked better if eva was more abouth the robots and less abouth psychological trauma. So the genderbender angla would be a bad story Asuka and Rei would yust jump to Toji and Kensuka also because gendo named both Shinji and Rei and femlale Shinji would have been named Rei Ikari and a male Rei would have been named Shinji Ayanami, this would yust be confusing. Still if the early concept design was right I would have liked to see have seen a nod with Toji doing Asuka happy stand (spread legs hands on waist)[examples when they go have dinner "the value of miracles 21:15" of when the power is out and Shinji is opening the door "the day tokyo stood stil 9:18"] and Kensuke doing Rei's happy stand (clasping one arm behind her back and lifting one heel of the floor) [examples from the same scenes to make it easier to see what I mean]
